findings.description: Document describes Ingestion and Monitoring as 'independently' running but Monitoring (Stage 4) appears after Stages 1-3; document structure doesn't visually support parallel execution claim
findings.evidence: Overview states stages run 'independently' but Monitoring section appears last in document structure
findings.suggestion: Either restructure document to show parallel stages, add timeline diagram, or clarify that description order != execution order

findings.description: Claims '3x throughput due to reduced per-record overhead' but no calculation or verification that overhead is the primary driver
findings.evidence: Line: '3x throughput compared to streaming, due to reduced per-record overhead' - no supporting data
findings.suggestion: Provide overhead calculations, cite benchmark source, or use more hedged language

findings.description: Specific worker limit (8-12) provided without source or justification
findings.evidence: 'Recommended maximum of 8-12 workers per stage' with no citation or testing data
findings.suggestion: Add source citation or reframe as empirical observation

findings.description: 90-day retention window specified without justification or compliance context
findings.evidence: 'Event records are retained for 90 days after warehouse delivery, then purged' - rationale not explained
findings.suggestion: Explain why 90 days (compliance, cost analysis, legal hold) or make policy generic

findings.description: Document references 'canonical format' without defining it or referencing a specification
findings.evidence: 'Normalizes event schemas to a canonical format' - no definition of what canonical format is
findings.suggestion: Add brief definition or reference to format specification document

findings.description: References 'operational runbook (separate document)' that doesn't exist, creating external dependency
findings.evidence: 'Common issues and resolution steps are documented in the operational runbook (separate document)'
findings.suggestion: Include runbook summary or remove reference

findings.description: Execution model explanation is complex and could be clearer; distinction between independent and dependent stages not visually obvious
findings.evidence: Overview explanation mixes independent/dependent execution model without clear visual or sequential framing
findings.suggestion: Add timing diagram or clearer step-by-step sequential explanation

findings.description: Benchmarks provide technical assumptions but lack operational context (actual SLAs, cost implications)
findings.evidence: Section explains 'AWS instance sizing' but doesn't translate to operational meaning
findings.suggestion: Add context: what do these benchmarks mean operationally (e.g., latency SLAs, cost per event)
